title: DXF Entity Semantic Enrichment Output
description: Complete semantic enrichment output for a DXF-derived JSON file. Additive — never modifies the raw source JSON. One *.semantic.json file per raw JSON file.

source_file.description: Relative path to the raw DXF JSON file that was enriched

enrichment_version.description: Semantic version of the enrichment schema and logic used

family.description: Barrett product family name (e.g., RamProof_GC, Black_Pearl, PMMA, RT-250)

entities.description: One enrichment record per entity in the source JSON entities array

entity_index.description: Index of this entity in the source JSON entities array

entity_type.description: DXF entity type (e.g., LWPOLYLINE, HATCH, TEXT, MTEXT)

layer_name.description: Layer name as found in the raw DXF JSON

semantic_role.description: Semantic role assigned to this entity

confidence.description: Confidence score: 1.0 = operator confirmed, 0.9 = exact match, 0.7 = pattern match, 0.5 = fallback

operator_confirmed.description: Whether an operator has manually reviewed and confirmed this classification

total_entities.description: Total number of entities in the source file

system_owned_count.description: Number of entities classified as SYSTEM_OWNED

context_only_count.description: Number of entities classified as CONTEXT_ONLY

annotation_count.description: Number of entities classified as ANNOTATION

unclassified_count.description: Number of entities that fell through to fallback default

unique_layers.description: Sorted list of unique layer names encountered

entity_type_counts.description: Count of entities by DXF entity type

role_counts.description: Count of entities by semantic role

enrichment_tool.description: Tool that produced this enrichment (e.g., enrich_dxf_json_semantics.py)

enriched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when enrichment was performed

enriched_by.description: Operator or process that ran the enrichment

config_files_used.description: List of config file paths consumed during enrichment

original_dxf_path.description: Path to the original DXF file, if known from raw JSON metadata
